scripts.build-assets: npm run make-dirs && npm run copy-bootstrap && npm run copy-jquery && npm run copy-datatables && npm run copy-datatables-bs5 && npm run copy-fontawesome-woff2 && npm run copy-fontawesome-css && npm run copy-fontawesome-solid-css && npm run copy-jssha && npm run build-qrcode && npm run copy-otplib
scripts.copy-datatables: cp -r node_modules/datatables.net/js/ ufastauthd3/global/assets/ && cp -r node_modules/datatables.net/types/ ufastauthd3/global/assets/
scripts.copy-datatables-bs5: cp -r node_modules/datatables.net-bs5/js/ ufastauthd3/global/assets/ && cp -r node_modules/datatables.net-bs5/css/ ufastauthd3/global/assets/ && cp -r node_modules/datatables.net-bs5/types/ ufastauthd3/global/assets/
